question: How many different products ever had scrap?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.ProductID) FROM WorkOrder w WHERE w.ScrappedQty > 0

question: Give the number of unique products ever had scrap.
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.ProductID) FROM WorkOrder w WHERE w.ScrappedQty > 0

question: How many distinct vendors supply products priced above 50?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pv.BusinessEntityID) FROM ProductVendor pv WHERE pv.StandardPrice > 50

question: Count unique vendors supply products priced above 50.
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pv.BusinessEntityID) FROM ProductVendor pv WHERE pv.StandardPrice > 50

question: How many different vendors supply products priced above 50?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pv.BusinessEntityID) FROM ProductVendor pv WHERE pv.StandardPrice > 50

question: Give the number of unique vendors supply products priced above 50.
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pv.BusinessEntityID) FROM ProductVendor pv WHERE pv.StandardPrice > 50

question: How many distinct email addresss belong to employee-type persons?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.EmailAddress) FROM EmailAddress e JOIN Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID WHERE p.PersonType = 'EM'

question: Count unique email addresss belong to employee-type persons.
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.EmailAddress) FROM EmailAddress e JOIN Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID WHERE p.PersonType = 'EM'

question: How many different email addresss belong to employee-type persons?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.EmailAddress) FROM EmailAddress e JOIN Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID WHERE p.PersonType = 'EM'

question: Give the number of unique email addresss belong to employee-type persons.
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.EmailAddress) FROM EmailAddress e JOIN Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID WHERE p.PersonType = 'EM'

question: Per territory, how many distinct customers?
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: Count unique customers per territory.
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: For each territory, report the distinct customer count.
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: Show each territory with its unique customer count.
reference_sql: SELECT t.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h JOIN SalesTerritory t ON h.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID GROUP BY t.Name

question: Per customer (id up to 11200), how many distinct product purchaseds?
reference_sql: SELECT h.CustomerID, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN SalesOrderHeader h ON d.SalesOrderID = h.SalesOrderID WHERE h.CustomerID <= 11200 GROUP BY h.CustomerID

question: Count unique product purchaseds per customer (id up to 11200).
reference_sql: SELECT h.CustomerID, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN SalesOrderHeader h ON d.SalesOrderID = h.SalesOrderID WHERE h.CustomerID <= 11200 GROUP BY h.CustomerID

question: For each customer (id up to 11200), report the distinct product purchased count.
reference_sql: SELECT h.CustomerID, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN SalesOrderHeader h ON d.SalesOrderID = h.SalesOrderID WHERE h.CustomerID <= 11200 GROUP BY h.CustomerID

question: Show each customer (id up to 11200) with its unique product purchased count.
reference_sql: SELECT h.CustomerID, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN SalesOrderHeader h ON d.SalesOrderID = h.SalesOrderID WHERE h.CustomerID <= 11200 GROUP BY h.CustomerID

question: Per order year, how many distinct active customers?
reference_sql: SELECT substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4), COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h GROUP BY substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4)

question: Count unique active customers per order year.
reference_sql: SELECT substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4), COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h GROUP BY substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4)

question: For each order year, report the distinct active customer count.
reference_sql: SELECT substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4), COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h GROUP BY substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4)

question: Show each order year with its unique active customer count.
reference_sql: SELECT substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4), COUNT(DISTINCT h.CustomerID) FROM SalesOrderHeader h GROUP BY substr(h.OrderDate, 1, 4)

question: Per category, how many distinct distinct product solds?
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name

question: Count unique distinct product solds per category.
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name

question: For each category, report the distinct distinct product sold count.
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name

question: Show each category with its unique distinct product sold count.
reference_sql: SELECT c.Name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.ProductID) FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN ProductSubcategory s ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = s.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN ProductCategory c ON s.ProductCategoryID = c.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY c.Name
